name: SovereignAgent
description: Automated privacy-removal agent: scans the web for personal data leaks, classifies threats, and submits opt-out requests to data brokers. Payments via Superfluid streaming on Base.
author: normancomics

skills.name: Threat Scan
skills.description: Searches the public web for mentions of a person's name that contain PII (phone numbers, email addresses, SSNs, home address). Returns a threat report with severity levels.

inputs.name: fullName
inputs.description: Full name of the person to scan for

outputs.name: threats
outputs.description: Array of detected threats with title, link, description, threatLevel (benign/high/critical), and reasons

skills.name: Data Removal Request
skills.description: Submits opt-out / removal requests to known data broker endpoints on behalf of the user.

inputs.name: threatUrl
inputs.description: URL of the page containing the PII to remove

inputs.name: fullName
inputs.description: Full name of the person requesting removal

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Object with broker name and status (success/failed)

skills.name: Full Privacy Sweep
skills.description: Runs a full threat scan followed by automated removal requests for all high/critical findings, with real-time Superfluid micropayment streaming for the duration of the task.

inputs.name: walletAddress
inputs.description: Wallet address to stream payment from

outputs.name: flowTxHash
outputs.description: Transaction hash of the Superfluid flow start

pricing.note: Priced by streaming flow rate (set FLOW_RATE in env)
